nasb.text: And Jesus *said to her, “Woman, what does that have to do with us? My hour has not yet come.”

esv.text: And Jesus said to her, “Woman, what does this have to do with me? My hour has not yet come.”

cnv.text: 耶穌說：“母親，我跟你有甚麼關係呢？我的時候還沒有到。”

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“妇人，这跟你我有什么相干？我的时候还没有到。”

csbs.text: 耶稣对她说：“母亲，这与你我有什么关系？我的时候还没有到。”
